description.content: Returns log status, upload time, nodes/ports counts and optional error.
Returns node attributes and optional info blocks (switch_info / system_info / sharp_info).

item.name: Submit a log archive for parsing

request.name: Submit a log archive for parsing

description.content: Accepts a path to a zip archive (relative to data/), persists a `processing` log entry and runs parsing in background. Use GET /api/v1/log/{log_id} to poll status.

response.name: validation error (bad body, empty path, path outside data/, file not found, not a zip archive)
internal error (failed to persist processing log)

description.content: Returns the list of ports for the given node, ordered by port number.
Returns nodes and ports for the given log.
Returns 200 if the database is reachable, 503 otherwise.
REST API for parsing InfiniBand fabric logs (ibdiagnet2) and querying topology.
